assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Clearly identifies Service A as 'HIGH RISK' and states it 'will block all upgrades' because '100% of pods must remain available at all times'

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Identifies Service B as 'HIGH RISK' and explicitly states it's 'Identical to Service A - no disruptions allowed ever' and 'will block all node drains'

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Marks Service C as 'SAFE' and explains 'Allows 1 pod disruption (3 total - 2 required = 1 disruptable)' and 'GKE can drain 1 pod at a time'

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Marks Service D as 'SAFE' and states 'Allows 1 pod disruption while keeping 4/5 pods running' and 'GKE can drain 1 pod at a time'

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides specific fix for Service A: patch command to set 'minAvailable':null,'maxUnavailable':1' which effectively implements maxUnavailable=1

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides specific patch command for Service B to set 'maxUnavailable':1'

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: In GKE-Specific Behavior section, states 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during node drains' and 'After 1 hour, GKE may force-drain nodes even with blocking PDBs'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Provides complete kubectl patch commands for both Service A and Service B with specific JSON patch syntax

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: In Key Principles section, explicitly states 'Test PDB behavior in staging clusters before applying to production'
